description: Apache Tika Core provides the key interfaces, MIME type detection, metadata handling, and facade APIs used by Apache Tika applications. It lets JVM applications identify content types and work with Tika's core parsing contracts without pulling in the full parser package.

Apache Tika Core provides the key interfaces, MIME type detection, metadata handling, and facade APIs used by Apache Tika applications. It lets JVM applications identify content types and work with Tika's core parsing contracts without pulling in the full parser package.
